definitions.text: verb der subjektet i setningen retter handlingen mot seg selv, for eksempel i uttrykkene ‘hun giftet seg’, ‘de skyndte seg’, ‘vi samler oss’, ‘du undrer deg’
definitions.translation: verb where the subject in the sentence directs the action towards itself, in the expressions 'she got married', 'they hurried', 'we gathered', 'you wondered'
